highlightPatterns.description: CSS property names. Highlights declarations like display, margin, padding, color, background, etc.
CSS selector names. Highlights class (.name), ID (#name), and element (tag) selectors.
CSS custom property references. Highlights var(--name) usages to show where variables are consumed.
CSS custom property definitions. Highlights --property-name declarations to show where variables are assigned.
CSS at-rule keywords. Highlights @-prefixed rule identifiers.
CSS color values. Highlights hex colors and color function invocations.
CSS pseudo-class selectors. Highlights state-based and structural pseudo-classes.
CSS pseudo-element selectors. Highlights virtual elements that style specific parts of an element.
CSS function calls. Highlights built-in CSS functions.
